homeScreen.title: FullStack Developer
homeScreen.description: During my career, I acquired various skills in different areas of programming:

web.title: Web
web.description: Development of custom websites integrating APIs and microservices.

server.title: Server
server.description: Development of APIs and microservices with different connection protocols.

android.title: Android
android.description: Development of native applications for android devices.

desktop.title: Desktop
desktop.description: Development of desktop applications with modern interfaces.

database.title: Database
database.description: Design and management of relational and non-relational databases.

deployment.title: Deployment
deployment.description: Deployment of applications on third-party cloud servers.

machineLearning.title: Machine Learning
machineLearning.description: Training of models for real-time object detection.

design.title: Design
design.description: Design of modern and user-friendly interfaces.
